subject: App Crash Report - Calendar View
body:
Hello Support Team,

I am writing to report a critical bug in your application. The app crashes immediately when I navigate to the Calendar view.

Device: iPhone 13 Pro
OS: iOS 17.3.1
App Version: 3.0.1

Steps to reproduce:
1. Open the app
2. Tap on the Calendar icon in the bottom navigation
3. App crashes to home screen immediately

This has been happening consistently since the 3.0.1 update three days ago. I have tried:
- Reinstalling the app
- Restarting the device
- Clearing app cache

Please fix this urgently as I rely on this app for my daily work.

Best regards,
Emma Wilson

subject: Login Issue After Update
body:
Hi,

Since the latest update I cannot log in to my account. The app just shows a loading spinner indefinitely after I enter my credentials.

Phone: Samsung Galaxy S22
Android version: 14
App version: 3.0.1

I've tried resetting my password but the issue persists. Please help!

Thanks,
David

subject: Data Loss - Tasks Disappeared
body:
URGENT: All my tasks from the past month have disappeared after the 3.0.0 update. I had 87 tasks across 5 projects and they are all gone now.

Device: Google Pixel 7
Android: 13
App Version: 3.0.0

This is unacceptable. I need my data back immediately. Please escalate this to your engineering team.

- Robert Martinez

subject: Notification Bug on Android
body:
Hello,

Push notifications have stopped working on my Android device since I updated to version 3.0.0.

Device info:
- OnePlus 11
- Android 13
- App version 3.0.0

Steps to reproduce:
1. Set a reminder for a task
2. Wait for the scheduled time
3. No notification appears

All notification permissions are enabled. I've checked battery optimization settings too. The issue started right after the update.

Regards,
Priya Sharma

subject: Feature Request: Dark Mode
body:
Hello FeedWise Team,

I love using your app but I really need a dark mode option. I work late nights and the bright white screen causes eye strain after prolonged use.

Many competing apps already have this feature. It would make your app much more comfortable to use in low-light environments.

Could you please consider adding this in a future update? This is a highly requested feature based on the community forums I've seen.

Thank you,
James O'Brien

subject: Suggestion: Google Calendar Sync
body:
Hi Support,

I'd like to suggest adding Google Calendar synchronization to the app. Currently I have to maintain two separate systems for my tasks and calendar events.

A two-way sync would be incredibly useful for:
1. Seeing tasks alongside calendar events
2. Automatically blocking time for tasks in Google Calendar
3. Getting unified reminders

I'm happy to beta test this feature if you're working on it.

Best,
Sophie Turner

subject: Request for PDF Export Feature
body:
To whom it may concern,

We are a team of 15 people using your app for project management. We frequently need to share task lists and project status in meetings.

Could you add functionality to export tasks and projects to PDF or Excel format? This would greatly improve our team's workflow and eliminate the need to manually recreate reports.

This feature would likely benefit many business users of your application.

Regards,
Michael Chen
Team Lead, DevTeam Alpha

subject: Subscription Price Too High
body:
Hello,

I've been using your app for 6 months and while I like it, the subscription price is too steep. $9.99/month adds up to almost $120/year for what is essentially a to-do list.

Competitors offer similar functionality for free or at much lower prices. I'm considering cancelling unless you can offer a discount or a more affordable plan.

Please let me know if you have any promotional pricing available.

Thanks,
Karen Williams

subject: Terrible Customer Service Experience
body:
I am extremely disappointed with your customer service. I submitted a support ticket 10 days ago about a sync issue and have received NO response whatsoever.

This is completely unacceptable for a paid service. I am paying $9.99/month and can't even get a response to a basic support request.

I will be disputing this charge with my credit card company and leaving negative reviews on every platform I can find.

- An Very Angry Customer
